risks.title: Duplicate Event Monitoring Issue
risks.evidence: Four nearly-identical events for Security.tsx within 17ms (timestamps 19:02:22.476/477Z and 19:02:39.029/030Z); relevance scores inconsistent (0.2-0.95) for same file changes
risks.recommendedAction: Implement deduplication in code-observer event pipeline; standardize relevance scoring logic to prevent redundant alerts

risks.title: Security File Modified Without Verification Status
risks.evidence: Security.tsx (src/screens/) changed at 19:02:22 and 19:02:39 UTC on 2026-04-27; two high-relevance events (0.95, 0.85) indicate significant modifications to authentication/security-critical component
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review all Security.tsx changes and run security test suite before merging to production

opportunities.title: Strengthen Security Module Testing
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx receiving multiple active modifications; critical component with high event relevance scores suggests important changes
opportunities.suggestedAction: Audit and expand security test coverage for Security.tsx, including auth flows and permission checks

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx Code Changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine all modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx from event timestamps (19:02:22-19:02:39 UTC). Verify no vulnerabilities, auth bypass risks, or security regressions introduced.
taskCandidates.rationale: High-relevance events (0.85-0.95) indicate significant security file modifications requiring expert review

taskCandidates.title: Execute Security Test Suite
taskCandidates.description: Run all tests for Security.tsx and related authentication/authorization modules to verify no regressions from recent changes
taskCandidates.rationale: Security-critical file modified; automated validation required before merge

taskCandidates.title: Fix Event Monitoring Deduplication
taskCandidates.description: Update code-observer to deduplicate events within 100ms window for same file; consolidate four Security.tsx events into single aggregated alert
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal quality and create false urgency; systematic fix improves future event reliability

recommendations.title: Add Event Deduplication to Code Observer
recommendations.rationale: Identical file changes generate multiple redundant events at nearly same timestamp, degrading alert signal
recommendations.action: Implement sliding window deduplication (100ms) in code-observer to combine events and deduplicate before emission

recommendations.title: Enable Branch Protection for Security Files
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx modifications should undergo mandatory review before merge to prevent vulnerabilities
recommendations.action: Configure CODEOWNERS and require security team approval for src/screens/Security.tsx changes

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx Code Changes
Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Execute Security Test Suite
